evals.prompt: Plan a Tracy memory capture and explain required LD_PRELOAD handling.
evals.expected_output: Provides LD_PRELOAD discovery, Kit memory flags, capture binary isolation, and strip-test verification.
assertions: Discovers liballocwrapper.so and fails fast if missing
Sets LD_PRELOAD only for the Kit workload
Unsets LD_PRELOAD before running Tracy capture binary
Includes update -s M strip test and explains file-size interpretation

evals.prompt: liballocwrapper.so is not present in my pip Isaac Sim install. Can I still validate memory tracing?
evals.expected_output: Treats missing allocator wrapper as a blocked prerequisite and does not fake a memory capture.
assertions: States pip Isaac Sim may lack liballocwrapper.so
Suggests Packman/source Kit package that includes the wrapper
